## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss a senior content manager role at growthx.ai, focusing on managing AI-driven content workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/ABNuGobgR9qj8xnzcnGEtSv48zMLP8d3?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [growthx.ai is building an internal platform for high-leverage content creation using AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/ABNuGobgR9qj8xnzcnGEtSv48zMLP8d3?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
  - [The role involves managing AI "writers" (workflows) rather than human writers, requiring strong editorial skills](https://fathom.video/share/ABNuGobgR9qj8xnzcnGEtSv48zMLP8d3?tab=summary&timestamp=1211.0)
  - [The company is profitable with a $7M run rate, recently raised a $12M Series A, and has \~40 employees](https://fathom.video/share/ABNuGobgR9qj8xnzcnGEtSv48zMLP8d3?tab=summary&timestamp=1563.0)
  - [Key focus: articulating content quality differences to improve AI workflows continuously](https://fathom.video/share/ABNuGobgR9qj8xnzcnGEtSv48zMLP8d3?tab=summary&timestamp=1224.0)

## Topics

### growthx.ai's Business Model

  - [Internal platform development for content creation, not SaaS](https://fathom.video/share/ABNuGobgR9qj8xnzcnGEtSv48zMLP8d3?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [$7M run rate, profitable, recently raised $12M Series A](https://fathom.video/share/ABNuGobgR9qj8xnzcnGEtSv48zMLP8d3?tab=summary&timestamp=1563.0)
  - [40 employees, fully remote, global team](https://fathom.video/share/ABNuGobgR9qj8xnzcnGEtSv48zMLP8d3?tab=summary&timestamp=1581.0)
  - [Clients pay for content output, not software access](https://fathom.video/share/ABNuGobgR9qj8xnzcnGEtSv48zMLP8d3?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [AI workflows act as "writers", human managers as editors](https://fathom.video/share/ABNuGobgR9qj8xnzcnGEtSv48zMLP8d3?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)
  - [Workflows include outline generation, keyword research, article writing, post-processing](https://fathom.video/share/ABNuGobgR9qj8xnzcnGEtSv48zMLP8d3?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
  - [Highly customizable for each client's specific needs and brand voice](https://fathom.video/share/ABNuGobgR9qj8xnzcnGEtSv48zMLP8d3?tab=summary&timestamp=1132.0)
  - [Enables high-leverage content production (e.g., 40 articles edited in one day)](https://fathom.video/share/ABNuGobgR9qj8xnzcnGEtSv48zMLP8d3?tab=summary&timestamp=1164.0)

### Role of Senior Content Manager

  - [Acts more as an editor than a writer, managing AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/ABNuGobgR9qj8xnzcnGEtSv48zMLP8d3?tab=summary&timestamp=1206.0)
  - [Articulates differences between good and bad content to improve processes](https://fathom.video/share/ABNuGobgR9qj8xnzcnGEtSv48zMLP8d3?tab=summary&timestamp=1224.0)
  - [Bridges gap between content needs and engineering implementation](https://fathom.video/share/ABNuGobgR9qj8xnzcnGEtSv48zMLP8d3?tab=summary&timestamp=1348.0)
  - [Requires high agency and ability to synthesize disparate skills](https://fathom.video/share/ABNuGobgR9qj8xnzcnGEtSv48zMLP8d3?tab=summary&timestamp=2772.0)

### Types of Content Produced

  - [Programmatic SEO (e.g., 50+ state-specific pages for legal startup)](https://fathom.video/share/ABNuGobgR9qj8xnzcnGEtSv48zMLP8d3?tab=summary&timestamp=1828.0)
  - [Editorial/organic content for authority building and top-of-funnel traffic](https://fathom.video/share/ABNuGobgR9qj8xnzcnGEtSv48zMLP8d3?tab=summary&timestamp=1894.0)
  - [Custom publication creation for clients (e.g., sponsored industry news site)](https://fathom.video/share/ABNuGobgR9qj8xnzcnGEtSv48zMLP8d3?tab=summary&timestamp=1952.0)

### Future Vision

  - [Expand beyond content to other business processes (sales, HR, operations)](https://fathom.video/share/ABNuGobgR9qj8xnzcnGEtSv48zMLP8d3?tab=summary&timestamp=2639.0)
  - [Eventually offer platform publicly as a tool for knowledge workers](https://fathom.video/share/ABNuGobgR9qj8xnzcnGEtSv48zMLP8d3?tab=summary&timestamp=1289.0)
  - [Potential to revolutionize media landscape, enabling solo creators to compete with large newsrooms](https://fathom.video/share/ABNuGobgR9qj8xnzcnGEtSv48zMLP8d3?tab=summary&timestamp=2654.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Michael to speak with Marilia for follow-up discussion](https://fathom.video/share/ABNuGobgR9qj8xnzcnGEtSv48zMLP8d3?tab=summary&timestamp=2864.0)
  - [Potential further conversation between Matthew and Michael to explore fit](https://fathom.video/share/ABNuGobgR9qj8xnzcnGEtSv48zMLP8d3?tab=summary&timestamp=2869.0)
  - [Michael to consider how his diverse skill set could apply to the role](https://fathom.video/share/ABNuGobgR9qj8xnzcnGEtSv48zMLP8d3?tab=summary&timestamp=2708.0)
